title: X-tra Crispy Fried Korean Bananas Fritters
description: A crispy and flavorful Korean dessert featuring fried ripe bananas. Perfect for a solo dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the flour, cornstarch, sugar, cinnamon, ginger, and salt.
Peel the bananas and cut them into 1-inch pieces.
Add the banana pieces to the dry ingredients and toss until they are evenly coated.
Heat about 2 inches of vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add the banana pieces in batches and fry until they are golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fried bananas from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
In a small bowl, mix together the mustard seeds and green onions.
Sprinkle the mustard seed mixture over the fried bananas and serve immediately.
